data.title: Tesla Model 3 Prices Rise In China As Refreshed Model Y Debuts
data.description: Tesla has hiked the price of all variants of its cheapest offering- the Model 3- in China by 3,600 yuan (about $491).

data.title: Why Zoomcar Shares Are Trading Higher By Over 40%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway To Have Minimal Impact From LA Wildfires, But Insurers Like Mercury General, Chubb Face Higher Risk
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway is not a major player in the California homeowners insurance market, hence the impact of the wildfires is expected to be minimal.

data.title: Palantir Co-Founder Joe Lonsdale Touts Lead Over Traditional Contractors Amid Stock Dip: Analyst Says 2025 To Be A Breakthrough Year
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. continues to reshape modern warfare despite recent market volatility, with shares down 10.51% year-to-date after surging over 306% in the past year, according to co-founder Joe Lonsdale.

data.title: Rocket Lab Expands NASA Partnership With Neutron Under VADR Contract
data.description: Rocket Lab partners with NASA to launch Neutron rocket under existing contract, expanding capabilities for missions and long-term goals.
